name: offline-ai-chat
description: Self-hosted web client for LM Studio with offline RAG, OCR, multilingual embeddings, and zero client-side dependencies.

scripts.check: for f in app.js server.js modules/*.js modules/ui/*.js modules/ui/settings/*.js modules/workspace/*.js modules/rag/*.js; do node --check "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "$f OK" || echo "FAIL $f"; done

author: pabstmp
